channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Resident Evil Requiem sales top seven million
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

One million sold siince March 16.

Total sales for Resident Evil Requiem have surpassed seven million units, game director Koshi Nakanishi revealed in an Instagram story.

Resident Evil Requiem launched for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store on February 27.

Sales were last reported to have surpassed six million units on March 16.

Here is the photo of the celebratory cakes posted by Nakanishi:

Thanks, Twisted Voxel.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/resident-evil-requiem-sales-top-seven-million
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Genshin Impact’s next major region Snezhnaya launches August 12
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

The Nation of Cryo arrives.

Genshin Impact‘s next major region, Snezhnaya, will launch on August 12, miHoYo announced in a special “Behind the Scenes” live stream today.

The live stream featured members of the developer team, who shared in-depth insights into the creative philosophy, world-building, gameplay innovations, and future direction behind the game.

Highlights inlude:

  • Snezhnaya Arrives August 12 – The Nation of Cryo is finally coming in what is a narrative and gameplay milestone years in the making.
  • Story and World-Building – The culmination of plot lines, dating back to the game’s launch, will reveal the Tsaritsa’s agenda and the fate of the six Gnoses.
  • Cultural Inspirations – Trains, as both a new cultural element and new functional vehicle, and music inspired by classical symphonic traditions and Slavic folk music.
  • Evolving Combat and Interaction Mechanics – Cryo as a means of preservation in the open world, along with more brand-new gameplay.
  • Visual Improvements – Across-the-board character visual upgrades and greater integration of gameplay and cinematic storytelling.

Genshin Impact is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PC via client and Epic Games Store, iOS via the App Store, and Android via Google Play.

Watch the video below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Behind the Scenes of Genshin Impact: “To Snezhnaya and the Future”

English

Japanese

Korean

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/genshin-impacts-next-major-region-snezhnaya-launches-august-12
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Unannounced Tumblepop remake Tumblepop: Memories rated in Korea
item.content:encoded:
From Daewon Media Game Lab.

The Game Rating and Administration Committee of Korea has rated Tumblepop: Memories, an unannounced remake of the 1991-released Data East platform game Tumblepop.

The description offers no additional information outside of it being an action game and modern remake. It is published by Daewon Media Game Lab, which previously handled games like Snow Bros. Special and Gensei Suikoden Plus.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/unannounced-tumblepop-remake-tumblepop-memories-rated-in-korea
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
